sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n73058" key="o)ligopragmosu/nh" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀλῐγο-πραγμοσύνη</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n73058.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a retired life,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1264.tlg001:3:176" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Chrysipp.Stoic.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.176</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
